pages.title: No Current Survival Route
pages.text: The following traits exist for:$(li)Datapacks$(li)Compatibility$(li)Future systems$(p)Standard progression does not currently provide their component or treatment.$(p)They are documented so commands and extended datapacks remain understandable.

pages.title: Sturdy and Sure Grip
pages.text: $(bold)Sturdy$()$(li)×1.08 durability$(li)×0.98 mining speed$(li)−0.05 attack speed$(p)$(bold)Sure Grip$()$(li)+0.05 attack speed$(li)×1.01 mining speed$(p)Neither has a built-in survival material source.

pages.title: Nether Traits
pages.text: $(bold)Nether-Forged$()$(li)Dropped item is fireproof$(li)×1.12 durability$(li)+0.45 attack damage$(li)−0.02 attack speed$(li)Fire/nether affinity$(p)$(bold)Nether-Treated$()$(li)Fire/nether affinity only$(p)Their treatment path is inactive.

pages.title: Echoing
pages.text: $(bold)Echoing$()$(li)Sculk affinity$(li)Silence affinity$(li)Echo affinity$(li)No direct MTF stat effect$(li)No built-in survival source$(p)Workmanship labels are not material traits. Their real bonuses come from the quality bands in this guide.
